title: ATR Volatility-Targeting Position Size Layer
summary: Implement the volatility-targeting formula w_t = σ* / (√252 · σ_t) where σ* is a target annualised volatility per trade (e.g. 1.5%) and σ_t is the 14-day ATR expressed as a percentage of current price. This automatically shrinks position size when a stock is moving fast and grows it when volatility is compressed — the opposite of what emotional traders do. It is the most empirically validated position sizing technique in recent quantitative literature and requires only ATR, which yfinance provides.
